name: tailwind-implement
description: Tailwind CSS v4 CSS-first configuration and shadcn/ui component composition patterns. Covers @theme tokens, @custom-variant dark mode, @utility helpers, @starting-style animations, container queries, color-mix() for alpha scales, CVA component factories, and the complete shadcn/ui component API including form patterns, composition rules, icon discipline, styling guidelines, and Base vs Radix API differences.
author: natuleadan
abstract: Implementation layer of frontend design: Tailwind CSS v4 CSS-first configuration and shadcn/ui component composition patterns.
